opinion.h4: PECK ET AL. v. NEW YORK. APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK. No. 437. Decided January 16, 1961.
opinion.p: Kenneth W. Greenawalt and Harrop Freeman for appellants.
Frank S. Hogan and Harold Roland Shapiro for appellee.
The appeal is dismissed. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
